title: SIMPLY: Survival
description: With this modpack you can enjoy a Survival Plus experience with improvements at all levels.
body:
- An enhance of the vanilla Minecraft experience focused on survival gameplay -

![------------------------------](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f55979b7c45e7404859ce0a3d4b0c5120df36faa.png)

Features


This modpack contains over 100 mods, some of the features that this mods inlcudes are:


- **Biomes & Structures** - Enhanced versions of the vanilla structures and biomes - **Quality of Life** - Simplified gameplay with smoother mechanics for daily tasks. - **Performance** - Optimized for minimal lag and a seamless gaming experience.

If you'd like to use these mods for personal enjoyment, please download them from their original sources to support the creators.


MOD LIST ||| |-----|-------------| | [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) | Optimizes physics and other game operations to improve performance. | | [Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/ly-graves) | Adds graves on death to save dropped items. | | [Foggy Pale Garden (FPG)](https://modrinth.com/mod/foggypalegarden) | Enhances atmosphere with fog and a mysterious vibe. | | [TrashSlot](https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot) | Adds a trash slot in the inventory to easily delete items. | | [Peek](https://modrinth.com/mod/peek) | Allows previewing chests and containers without opening them. | | [NetherPortalFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherportalfix) | Fixes portal linking errors in the Nether. | | [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) | Shows contextual information about blocks and items when looking at them. | | [Dungeons and Taverns Desert Temple Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-desert-temple-overhaul) | Overhauls desert temples for better exploration. | | [Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) | Improves server performance with many players. | | [Almanac](https://modrinth.com/mod/almanac) | Displays useful world info such as weather and seasons. | | [Item interactions mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-interactions-mod) | Adds contextual interactions between items. | | [Lanterns Belong on Walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/lanterns-bow) | Allows placing lanterns on walls. | | [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) | Shader support compatible with Sodium. | | [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) | Configuration API for mods. | | [Simple Armor Hud](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-armor-hud) | Displays armor durability and status on screen. | | [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) | Reloads game language without restarting. | | [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) | Improved GUI for configuring Sodium. | | [Extended Bone Meal](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-bone-meal) | Adds more uses for bone meal on plants. | | [Sodium Fullbright](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-fullbright) | Fullbright lighting support for Sodium. | | [Nightosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/nightosphere) | Adds a surreal, dreamlike biome/dimension. || [Cut Through](https://modrinth.com/mod/cut-through) | Allows passing through certain blocks to ease movement. | | [ARRP but it's Different but it's Still ARRP](https://modrinth.com/mod/arrp-but-different) | Library for advanced custom structure generation. | | [Item Signs](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-signs) | Adds signs with items for custom labeling. | | [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) | Customizable minimap with waypoints and features. | | [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) | API to simplify mod configuration. | | [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit) | Allows quick exit from the game without wait times. | | [Gardener's Dream](https://modrinth.com/mod/gardeners-dream) | Adds new plants and gardening tools. | | [RenderScale](https://modrinth.com/mod/renderscale) | Lets you adjust render scale for better performance or quality. | | [Packed Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/packed-packs) | Adds compressed resource and mod packs functionality. | | [Dungeons and Taverns Jungle Temple Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-jungle-temple-overhaul) | Overhauls jungle temples for richer exploration. | | [Anvil Restoration](https://modrinth.com/mod/anvil-restoration) | Restores old anvil functionalities. | | [Move Boats](https://modrinth.com/mod/move-boats) | Allows moving boats in any direction for better navigation. | | [TCDCommons API](https://modrinth.com/mod/tcdcommons) | Utility library for other mods. | | [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) | Dynamically adjusts FPS to save resources when idle. | | [RideHud](https://modrinth.com/mod/ridehud) | Adds a HUD showing useful info when riding entities. | | [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) | Optimizes memory usage for better performance. | | [Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-shadowy-path-blocks) | Visual improvements for path blocks with Sodium. | | [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) | Patches various game aspects for better stability and performance. | | [Better Snow Coverage](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-snow-coverage) | Enhances snow coverage and appearance. | | [Improved Village Placement](https://modrinth.com/mod/improved-village-placement) | Adjusts and improves village generation. || [Unbreakable InvMove with other mods. | | [VanillaConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillaconfig) | Provides a simple interface for mod configurations. || [Villages Enhances water visuals for realism. | | [Dungeons and Taverns Nether Fortress Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-nether-fortress-overhaul) | Revamps Nether fortresses for better Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-ancient-city-overhaul) | Overhauls the ancient city structures for better gameplay. | | [Fabric Language Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-and-taverns-pillager-outpost-overhaul) | Revamps pillager outposts with new designs. | | [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) | Library mod providing utilities for puzzle mechanics. || [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) | A library mod that provides shared functionality for other mods. | | Date?](https://modrinth.com/mod/aiutd) | Checks for mod updates and alerts the player. | | [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) | A collection of tweaks aimed at improving Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/double-doors) | Enables opening double doors simultaneously. | | [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) | Provides an in-game mod menu for easy mod configuration. | | [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) | Adds customizable features to entity models. | | [Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic) | Adds magic without breaking each block. | | [yyz's backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/yyzs-backpack) | Adds backpacks for expanded inventory space. | | [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) | Optimizes chunk loading for better performance and concurrency. | | [Lithostitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched) | Adds new stitching and pattern mechanics to the game. || [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) | A core library mod providing utilities for other mods. | | [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape) | Adds a new biome and dimension with unique features. | | [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) | Adds advanced texture features to entities. | | [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) | Improves game startup and loading speeds. | | [MinecraftCapes | Wear any cape, cost free](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraftcapes) | Allows players to wear custom capes for free. | | [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/mod/geophilic) | Adds geology-inspired features and blocks. | | [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu) | Enhances the Minecraft main menu with custom options. | | [Move Minecarts](https://modrinth.com/mod/move-minecarts) | Allows improved minecart movement and control. | | [Trade Cycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling) | Enables cycling through trades in villager trading GUI. | | [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) | Adds food HUD info like hunger and saturation values. | | [Cliff Face](https://modrinth.com/mod/cliff-face) | Adds new cliff-style terrain generation for better landscapes. | | [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) | Additional performance improvements for Sodium mod. | | [Sheep Variety](https://modrinth.com/mod/sheep-variety) | Adds new sheep variants with unique wool colors. | | [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete) | Adds new concrete blocks and textures. | | [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) | Makes trees fall realistically when chopped. | | [Better Respawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-respawn) | Adds more options and control for respawning. | | [Vanilla Fireflies](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-fireflies) | Adds firefly particles for ambiance. | | [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky) | Shows chunk boundaries and info for debugging. | | [Camera Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-utils) | Provides utilities for custom camera control. | | [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) | Adds dynamic lighting from held or dropped items. | | [WITS (What Is This effects. | | [Structory](https://modrinth.com/mod/structory) | Mod for managing and placing structures. | | [Superb Steeds](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-steeds) | Enhances horses and rideable mobs inventory. ||-----|-------------| |||

Recomended Textures & Shaders


In this section, I’ve compiled a list of texture packs and shaders that I personally recommend to enhance your Minecraft experience.While these are optional, I believe they will significantly improve the overall look and feel of your world. Simply follow the links to download the files.


Texture Packs & Shaders ||| |--------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------| | [Vanilla Tweaks Custom Texture Pack](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#MnPy0a) | A basic texture pack to enhance the look of Minecraft. | | [GUI Revision Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision-darkmode) | A sleek dark mode GUI that makes your interface much easier on the eyes. | | [Continuous Hotbar](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/continuoushotbar) | A texture pack that adds a continuous hotbar for smoother gameplay. | | [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) | An animation pack that revamps the character's movements for a more dynamic and lively feel. | | [More Mob Variants x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/more-mob-variants-fresh-animations-addon) | Adds new mob animations, improving the diversity and movement of mobs in the game. | | [Createful Plaques](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/createful-plaques) | A creative set of plaques that enhances the design possibilities for your builds. | | [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) | Adds smoother, more natural player movements to the game for a more immersive experience. | | [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) | Preserving the elements of Minecraft with exceptional quality, detail, and performance. | | [Shader Config File](https://www.mediafire.com/file/ydcqudlwulcnc1b/ComplementaryReimagined_r5.3_%252B_EuphoriaPatches_1.4.1.txt/file) | Shaders that improve the game's lighting and shadows for a more realistic experience. | |||
